component.name: ServHub
component.summary: A fast Linux app store powered by Flathub

description.p: ServHub is a sleek, fast Linux app store that lets you browse, install, and manage Flatpak apps from Flathub — all from a clean, modern interface.

ul.li: Browse all 3000+ apps directly from Flathub
Full app detail page with screenshots and version history
Install multiple apps simultaneously with live terminal output
Update checker for all installed Flatpak apps
Launch installed apps directly from ServHub
Library tab showing all installed apps
Live search across all Flathub categories

screenshot.caption: Full app detail page with screenshots

ul.li: Critical security update: Implemented strict sandboxing and context isolation for the frontend
Added support for detecting and managing system-wide Flatpak installations
Fixed a bug where users with massive app libraries could experience crashes
Added network timeouts to prevent the app from hanging during connection drops
Added visual error feedback if an installed application fails to launch
App detail page with screenshots and lightbox
Update checker with one-click update all
